mutants.description: Flipped comparison operator returns lowest version instead of highest
Uses versions[1] as reduce seed, skipping/breaking on single-element arrays
Uses >= 0 so equal versions still replace, but behavior differs for ties
Removed empty-array guard so empty input returns versions[0] (undefined-ish) not undefined cleanly
Swapped arguments to compareVersions inverts selection logic
